code:
sequenceDiagram participant DEV as Developer participant GIT as Git Repository participant DOCKER as Docker Build participant AR as Artifact Registry participant GKE as GKE Cluster participant K8S as Kubernetes API participant POD as Backend Pod participant OL as Ollama Container participant HPA as HPA Controller Note over DEV,HPA: CI/CD Deployment Pipeline DEV->>+GIT: git push (Groupware_IssueTracker) GIT->>-DEV: Push confirmed DEV->>+DOCKER: ./deploy-gke.sh DOCKER->>DOCKER: Validate Prerequisites DOCKER->>DOCKER: Setup GCloud Auth Note over DOCKER,AR: Image Build Process DOCKER->>+DOCKER: Build Ollama Image Note over DOCKER: FROM ollama/ollama:latest
RUN ollama pull tinyllama DOCKER->>-DOCKER: Ollama Image Ready DOCKER->>+DOCKER: Build Backend Image Note over DOCKER: FROM python:3.11
COPY app/ requirements.txt DOCKER->>-DOCKER: Backend Image Ready DOCKER->>+DOCKER: Build Frontend Image Note over DOCKER: FROM node:18 (Groupware_ChatRoom)
FROM nginx:alpine (Groupware_IssueTracker) DOCKER->>-DOCKER: Frontend Image Ready DOCKER->>+AR: Push Images AR->>AR: Store Images with Tags AR->>-DOCKER: Push Complete Note over DOCKER,HPA: Kubernetes Deployment DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/rbac.yaml K8S->>-DOCKER: RBAC Applied DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/configmap-cloud.yaml K8S->>-DOCKER: ConfigMap Applied DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/backend-deployment-cloud.yaml K8S->>K8S: Schedule Backend Pods K8S->>+POD: Create Backend Pod POD->>+AR: Pull Backend Image AR->>-POD: Image Downloaded POD->>+AR: Pull Ollama Image AR->>-POD: Image Downloaded Note over POD,OL: Pod Startup Sequence POD->>+OL: Start Ollama Container OL->>OL: Initialize Ollama Server OL->>OL: Load TinyLlama Model (Groupware_SprintBacklog) OL->>-POD: Ollama Ready (Groupware_KanbanBoard) POD->>+POD: Start FastAPI Container POD->>POD: Initialize FastAPI App POD->>+OL: Test Connection (Groupware_WikiPage) OL->>-POD: Connection Successful POD->>-POD: FastAPI Ready POD->>+K8S: Report Pod Ready K8S->>-POD: Readiness Confirmed K8S->>-DOCKER: Backend Deployment Complete DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/frontend-deployment-cloud.yaml K8S->>K8S: Schedule Frontend Pods K8S->>-DOCKER: Frontend Deployment Complete DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/hpa-cloud.yaml K8S->>+HPA: Create HPA Resources HPA->>HPA: Monitor Backend Metrics HPA->>-K8S: HPA Active K8S->>-DOCKER: HPA Applied DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl get services K8S->>-DOCKER: External IP Available DOCKER->>-DEV: Deployment Complete
App URL: http://EXTERNAL-IP Note over DEV,HPA: Health Verification DEV->>+GKE: curl http://EXTERNAL-IP/health GKE->>+POD: Route Health Check POD->>+OL: Verify Ollama Status OL->>-POD: Status OK POD->>-GKE: Health Check Passed GKE->>-DEV: 200 OK Note over DEV,HPA: Auto-scaling Verification HPA->>+POD: Monitor CPU/Memory POD->>-HPA: Metrics: CPU 30%, Memory 40% HPA->>HPA: Within Thresholds (Groupware_SprintBacklog) Note over DEV,HPA: Rolling Update Process DEV->>+DOCKER: Deploy New Version DOCKER->>+AR: Push Updated Images AR->>-DOCKER: Images Updated DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply (Groupware_SprintBacklog) K8S->>K8S: Rolling Update Strategy K8S->>+POD: Create New Pod POD->>POD: Start New Version POD->>-K8S: New Pod Ready K8S->>K8S: Terminate Old Pod K8S->>-DOCKER: Rolling Update Complete DOCKER->>-DEV: Update Successful

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要把这个CI/CD部署流程可视化出来，从开发者提交代码开始，一直到Kubernetes上的自动扩缩容。重点是展示整个流水线怎么把Ollama容器和Backend Pod串联起来。
明白，这个流程涉及Git Repository、Docker Build、Artifact Registry、GKE Cluster这些主要节点对吧？我想确认一下，Docker Build阶段是要拆成三个独立的镜像构建步骤吗？Ollama、Backend、Frontend？
对的，三个镜像都要单独构建。Ollama那个比较特殊，需要从ollama/ollama:latest基础镜像开始，还要内置tinyllama模型。Backend用Python 3.11，Frontend分两块——Node 18做构建，Nginx做最终服务。
好的，我把镜像构建流程画出来了，每个构建步骤都加了Note标注具体的Dockerfile内容。现在推到Artifact Registry之后，下一步是通过Kubernetes API做RBAC和ConfigMap的配置吗？
没错，RBAC和ConfigMap要先于任何Deployment。然后重点来了——Backend Pod的启动顺序很关键，必须先拉取Ollama镜像启动容器，等Ollama Server初始化完成、模型加载好，才能启动FastAPI。
这个启动依赖关系我理解了。那Pod和Ollama容器之间的交互要画成双向的吗？比如Ollama Ready之后通知Pod，Pod还要主动Test Connection验证连通性？
是的，双向的。Ollama初始化完成后报告Ready，然后FastAPI启动前要主动ping一下Ollama做健康检查，这个Test Connection我们内部文档化在Groupware WikiPage里。验证通过才认为Pod真正Ready。
Pod启动序列画好了。接下来Frontend Deployment和HPA的配置顺序有讲究吗？HPA是要监控Backend Pod的指标吧？
Frontend部署完再上HPA。HPA要持续监控Backend的CPU和内存，阈值内保持现状。对了，这里要体现Groupware SprintBacklog的关联——模型加载和阈值判断都对应我们的迭代任务。
HPA监控循环画进去了。最后部署完成后开发者要做健康检查，这个health endpoint会路由到Backend Pod，Pod再去查Ollama状态？
完全正确。200 OK返回才算整个部署成功。另外还要画一个Rolling Update的场景——开发者推送新版本，走同样的镜像构建流程，Kubernetes用滚动更新策略替换Pod。
滚动更新我画成：创建New Pod→启动新版本→New Pod Ready→终止Old Pod。这个流程也需要关联Groupware SprintBacklog吗？
对，kubectl apply那个节点标一下。还有几个Groupware工具要补全——IssueTracker关联git push，ChatRoom和KanbanBoard分别对应Frontend构建和Ollama Ready的状态通知。
都补上了。整体流程从Developer push开始，经过Git Repository、Docker Build、Artifact Registry，进入GKE后先配RBAC/ConfigMap，再部署Backend Pod（含Ollama启动序列），然后Frontend，最后HPA生效。验证环节和滚动更新也完整了。
等等，Docker Build阶段有个细节要改——Frontend的Node 18构建那一步，Groupware ChatRoom的标注位置不对，应该放在FROM node:18那一行，不是单独的一个Note。另外Ollama Image构建的Note里，RUN ollama pull tinyllama前面漏了换行符标记。
已修正，ChatRoom标注现在紧贴node:18构建步骤，Ollama的Dockerfile内容也补了正确的换行格式。还有需要调整的吗？
没问题了。整个图现在能清晰展示从代码提交到生产运行的完整链路，特别是Pod启动时的依赖顺序和HPA的自动扩缩容机制。可以定稿了。
